data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, West Johor, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak and Western Sabah and Labuan, Lahad Datu until 10:00AM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor Barat, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Lahad Datu sehingga 10:00 pagi; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, northern part of Tioman, Condore, Bunguran, southern part of Reef North, Reef South, Labuan, eastern part of Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 10:00AM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, utara Tioman, Condore, Bunguran, selatan Reef North, Reef South, Labuan, timur Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 10:00 pagi; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Selangor  (Klang and Kuala Langat);  Johor  (Muar, Batu Pahat and Pontian); and  Sarawak:  Betong (Saratok and Kabong), Sarikei, Sibu (Sibu), Mukah and Bintulu (Tatau and Bintulu) until 9:00AM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Selangor  (Klang dan Kuala Langat);  Johor  (Muar, Batu Pahat dan Pontian); dan  Sarawak:  Betong (Saratok dan Kabong), Sarikei, Sibu (Sibu), Mukah dan Bintulu (Tatau dan Bintulu) sehingga 9:00 pagi; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Typhoon Advisory (MEKKHALA)                  Time of Observation:  05:00, 23 June 2026                  Location:  Latitude 18.4 North and Longitude 125.4 East                  Movement:  Slow                  Maximum wind speed:  185 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 479 km Northeast of Luzon, Philippines.                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 1605 km Northeast of Sandakan, Sabah.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Taufan (MEKKHALA)                  Masa Pencerapan:  05:00, 23 Jun 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 18.4 Utara dan Longitud 125.4 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Perlahan                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  185 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 479 km ke Timur Laut Luzon, Philippines.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 1605 km ke Timur Laut Sandakan, Sabah.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.
